channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Justin Bieber’s 12-Year-Old ‘Journals’ Album Debuts on Billboard 200 After Coachella
item.description:
[Intro music fades out]
Host: Welcome to our music update. We've got some exciting news from the world of Billboard. Justin Bieber is making waves on the Billboard 200 chart, with not one, not two, but seven albums currently on the list. Let's dive into the details.
[Short music transition]
Host: The surprise entry is his 2013 album "Journals", which debuts at number 111 with nearly 13,000 equivalent album units earned in the US. This is the first time the album has had enough activity to chart in a single week. The album was originally released exclusively on iTunes, but now it's widely available on all digital platforms and even on CD and vinyl.
[Short music transition]
Host: But that's not all - five more of Bieber's albums have re-entered the chart, including "Purpose", "Believe", "My World 2.0", "Justice", and "My World". And his most recent album, "SWAG", has zoomed up to number 7 with 43,000 equivalent album units earned. This surge in activity comes after his headlining performances at Coachella, which were livestreamed on YouTube.
[Short music transition]
Host: So, what does this mean for Bieber's music career? With seven albums on the Billboard 200 at the same time, he's broken his own record for the most titles on the chart concurrently. We'll be keeping an eye on how his catalog performs in the coming weeks, especially with the second weekend of Coachella just wrapped up.
[Outro music starts]
Host: That's all for now. Thanks for tuning in to our music update. The latest Billboard 200 chart will be posted on their website on April 21, so be sure to check it out for the full list of top albums. Until next time, stay musical! [Outro music continues to play until the end]
